CE1.justification: Acted directly: named the error, proposed a concrete replacement, asked only 'swap in one of those?' — the user doesn't have to load anything to answer.

CE2.justification: Single tight paragraph; error, reason, proposed fix, and ask in roughly four clauses. No preamble, no closing summary.

CE3.justification: Says decisions.md was held and a daybook entry was created, but the in-band response doesn't name the daybook or why that route — that routing only appears in the actions list.

CE4.justification: Single artifact (daybook entry with Intent/Log/Handoff); draft and decisions.md untouched; clean partial state.
